title: Telephone
text: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell in 1876 and patented in the United States.

title: DNA
text: DNA is a molecule that carries genetic information in living organisms. Its double-helix structure was described by Watson and Crick in 1953.

title: Financial Crisis 2008
text: The 2008 financial crisis was driven by subprime mortgage defaults, securitization risk, excessive leverage, and the collapse of major financial institutions including Lehman Brothers.

title: Eiffel Tower
text: The Eiffel Tower is in Paris and was built between 1887 and 1889 by Gustave Eiffel's company for the 1889 World's Fair.

title: Climate Change
text: Climate change refers to long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns, largely driven by human greenhouse gas emissions since the industrial era.

title: Paris
text: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.

title: Photosynthesis
text: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy, producing glucose and oxygen from carbon dioxide and water.

title: Water Boiling Point
text: At standard atmospheric pressure, pure water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
